description: Search and Discovery Enhancements (items 11-20): Voice search via Web Speech API, search by humming Easter egg, search filters by decade, mood-based playlists, daily discovery feed, genre deep-dive pages, 'similar to...' search, release radar with calendar view, surprise me button, and search autocomplete previews with album art thumbnails.
steps: 1. Add voice search to app/components/SearchBar.tsx: add a microphone button that uses the Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition) to convert speech to text and populate the search field. Use the existing types/speech-recognition.d.ts type declarations.

2. Create app/components/search/HumSearch.tsx: add a fun Easter egg button 'Search by humming' that links to Google's hum-to-search feature (https://www.google.com/search?q=hum+to+search). Show as a small link/button near the search bar.

3. Enhance search filters for decade filtering: update app/components/SearchFilterChips.tsx and app/components/search/AdvancedFilters.tsx to add decade filter chips (80s, 90s, 2000s, 2010s, 2020s). The search page already has year filtering logic.

4. Create app/components/discover/MoodPlaylists.tsx: add mood-based discovery ('I'm feeling happy/sad/energetic/chill/romantic') that maps moods to search queries and fetches curated results from iTunes. Integrate into /discover page.

5. Create app/components/discover/DailyDiscovery.tsx: show 5 new songs every day based on user's listening history genres (from localStorage). Use a date-based seed to keep daily results consistent. Integrate into home page.
6. Create app/genre/[id]/page.tsx: genre deep-dive page showing genre history text, sub-genres list, top artists, and essential albums. Use iTunes search with genre terms.

7. Enhance search to detect 'similar to [artist]' pattern: in app/search/page.tsx, detect queries like 'similar to Radiohead' and use the existing lib/lastfm.ts getSimilarArtists() function to show related artists.

8. Create app/components/discover/ReleaseRadar.tsx: show albums released this week/month with a calendar-style view. Use Apple RSS feed data from lib/discovery.ts getNewReleases(). Add to /discover page.
9. Enhance the existing app/components/FeelingLucky.tsx: add a 'Surprise Me' variant that picks a random genre + random decade = unexpected discovery via iTunes search.
10. Enhance app/components/search/SearchSuggestions.tsx: show album art thumbnails alongside search autocomplete suggestions. Fetch artwork from recent searches or quick iTunes lookups.
acceptance_criteria: Voice search button appears and uses Web Speech API to fill search input
Hum-to-search Easter egg links to Google's feature
Decade filter chips (80s, 90s, 2000s, 2010s, 2020s) filter search results correctly
Mood-based discovery shows curated results based on mood selection
Daily discovery shows 5 songs that persist for the day
/genre/[id] page renders with genre info, artists, and albums
Queries like 'similar to Radiohead' return related artists
Release radar shows recent releases in a calendar/timeline view
Surprise Me generates random genre+decade discovery
Search suggestions show album art thumbnails
verification: bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
